meanings.definition: English writer known for his interest in mythology and in the classics (1895-1985)

examples: he went to his grave without forgiving me

meanings.definition: a place for the burial of a corpse (especially beneath the ground and marked by a tombstone)
examples: he put flowers on his mother's grave

meanings.definition: a mark (`) placed above a vowel to indicate pronunciation
German tennis player who won seven women's singles titles at Wimbledon (born in 1969)
shape (a material like stone or wood) by whittling away at it
examples: She is sculpting the block of marble into an image of her husband

meanings.definition: carve, cut, or etch into a material or surface
examples: engraved the trophy cupt with the winner's
the lovers scratched their names into the bark of the tree
